pi_items.source: Confirmed in setup_task.sh line 109 via python-docx Document.save()

Total: ~33 superscript runs.

privileged_info_summary: The task involves formatting a synthetic water quality lab report generated programmatically using python-docx. The draft document contains 43 subscript positions requiring formatting (including H2SO4, Ca2+, NO3-, Ca(OH)2, CO2, Al2(SO4)3, and other chemical formulas) and 33 superscript positions (including ionic charges and scientific notation exponents like ×10-3). The document is saved to /home/ga/Documents/lab_report_draft.docx and must be reformatted and saved to /home/ga/Documents/lab_report_formatted.docx. All key formulas (H2SO4, Ca2+, NO3-, 10-3, CO2) are present in the generated document.
